heading: Export of semiconductor manufacturing
label: 4605 Export of semiconductor manufacturing
text: Any export of materials, equipment, and technology developed by Sematech in whole or in part with financial assistance provided under shall be subject to the Export Administration Act of 1979 (50 U.S.C. App. 2401 et seq.) and shall not be subject to the Arms Export Control Act [ et seq.].section 4602(a) of this title122 U.S.C. 2751See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThe Export Administration Act of 1979, referred to in text, is , , , which was classified principally to section 2401 et seq. of the former Appendix to Title 50, War and National Defense, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as chapter 56 (§ 4601 et seq.) of Title 50, and was repealed by , , , except for sections 11A, 11B, and 11C thereof (, 4612, 4613).Pub.
